steps.t: The Summoning Horn can be found near Svanr at his small camp in northern Nud-melek. You should use the Summoning Horn to call Svanr when you are ready…
The First Hall can be found at the eastern-most gate of Nud-melek. Svanr can be summoned using the horn he gave you. You should head east with Svanr t…
The First Hall can be found at the eastern-most gate of Nud-melek. You should head east with Svanr to finish your pilgrimage through Moria.
